description: Case style: Stainless steel round casing with black finishingDial style: White round dial, has multi colour flame detailing and the circumference is studded with red stones, the 12 hour mark is highlighted with a white stone and branding below thatStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style and loops to hold the straps in placeFeatures: Screw to rest timeComes in a signature Giordano caseWater resistance up to 10 metersWarranty: One year from date of original purchase against all manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / ManufacturerWarranty Does Cover:1) Guaranteed against any defects in material or workmanship that may occur under normal use.2) In warranty if a hardware defect occurs within the warranty period, will either replace defective spare part or provide replacement product.3) In warranty when will replace defective spare part of product or provide replacement, defective spare part or product company property.4) A replacement of product or spare part customer warranty period should be same as per date of customer purchase.5) In warranty will make any necessary repairs or replacement which apply, at no cost to the customer6) In the event of any unforeseen circumstance, and spares not being available the company’s prevailing depreciation rules will be binding on the purchaser to accept as a commercial solution in lieu of repairs.Warranty Does Not Cover:1) Batteries, Crystal, Straps, Bracelets, Case and Watch Glasses1) Damages, breakage and scratched caused from accident, maltreatment or mishandling in normal wear, Tarnishing of watch bracelets or cases2) Water Damage, if the watch has been improperly used specific to the water resistance guidelines of the watch3) Tampered or damage by other none authorize service center or technician4) Not accept tampered bill or warranty card or photo copy5) This guarantee does not affect specific legal rights of a consumer6) Damages resulting from an act of God, including but not limited to fire, flood, earthquake and other natural disasters will be excluded.7) Any repair needed that not under warranty will at the cost of the customer8) It is your responsibility to back up any data up. If in repair or replacement, goal data is lost company claim no responsibility for this.9) The product purchase not use according to instructions given in the INSTRUCTION MANUAL, as determined by company.Note:1) In Warranty period service compulsory customer has to provide original purchase bill copy and warrant card copy (bill and warranty card should be fill up with all require detail customer name, model number, DOP, retailer name and address official stamp).2) Customer guaranteed period start from the date of purchase and it has been sold by an authorized and appointed dealer.
